title: SysAdminSuite Agent Feedback Event
description: A single feedback vote on an agent or model contribution. Accumulated evidence is read by the orchestrator to route around problematic agents or models.

agent_id.description: The agent that produced the contribution (opencode, agy, goose, or custom)

model_id.description: The model used for the contribution

provider_id.description: The provider that served the model

vote.description: thumbs_down flags the contribution as requiring undo/modification. Accumulated thumbs_down on an agent+model pair triggers orchestrator rerouting.

work_context.description: Brief context of what the agent was asked to do

contribution_summary.description: Optional summary of the contribution being voted on

reason.description: Optional reason for a thumbs_down vote, especially if the contribution had to be undone or modified

session_id.description: Optional session or run identifier for traceability

voter.description: Optional identifier for who cast the vote (operator, reviewer, automated gate)
